subcodes.first_line: O illumined youth! Thou art mentioned in this gathering and praised in this assembly, for thou art from the light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی در این محضر مذکوری و در این انجمن مشکور چه که روای از پرتو
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @courtesy; culture [adab]
